mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle, which reduces borrowing costs and boosts equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals potential monetary tightening, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in CPIAUCSL > 315 periods are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC > 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in the federal funds rate and inflation (CPIAUCSL) signal a tightening monetary cycle with stagflation risks, causing equity market declines over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods of FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL increases are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) indicates robust labor market conditions, boosting consumer spending and corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in PAYEMS growth periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: During high unemployment regimes (UNRATE > 5%), declining unemployment signals improving labor market conditions, which boost corporate profits and equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in UNRATE > 5 periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates strong manufacturing activity, which drives corporate earnings and stock market performance, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in INDPRO growth periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts (HOUST) reflect strong demand for residential construction, boosting related industries and corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns in HOUST growth periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and real sales (RSAFS) indicates strong overall demand, driving corporate revenues and stock market performance, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in GDPC1 and RSAFS growth periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03.
